nasb.text: So Moses cried out to the Lord, saying, “What shall I do to this people? A little more and they will stone me.”

esv.text: So Moses cried to the Lord, “What shall I do with this people? They are almost ready to stone me.”

cnv.text: 摩西向耶和華呼求，說：“我要怎樣對待這人民呢？他們幾乎要用石頭打死我了。”

ccb.text: 摩西就呼求耶和华说：“我拿这些百姓怎么办？他们准备拿石块打死我！”
